title: Sky clock
body: A clock that carries its sky. Each zone shows not just the hour but the sun on its arc, the moon pulling water, the planetary hour walking its ancient rotation, the season a place is in. Time as a continuous field, not a number.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'it's not a collab clock. it's just a clock. it's visualizing time, zodiac, sun, moons, planets, water levels, temperatures, all how they're all influencing each other'
